mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 1
mnemonics.content: All Roads Lead to Rome: A Regular matrix guarantees you'll eventually get to any state from any starting point.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: A stochastic matrix P is regular if some power P^k has all strictly positive entries.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: Regular Markov chains converge to a unique stationary distribution, regardless of the starting state.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: Regularity implies the Markov chain is both irreducible and aperiodic.
